requirement_topic.en: Cell and Pack Safety — EN IEC 62133 and Angolan IEC adoption
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——EN IEC 62133 与安哥拉对 IEC 的采纳
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——EN IEC 62133 與安哥拉對 IEC 的採納

summary.en: For Angola, lithium battery safety requirements are typically handled through standards workflows aligned to IEC references used by national standard bodies. Importers and regulators commonly rely on manufacturer technical files showing design safety, testing evidence, and proper markings for battery chemistry, capacity, and protective features before acceptance. In-country verification is often documentation and sample based, especially for regulated categories and batteries used in retail electronics channels.
summary.zh: 安哥拉的锂电池安全通常通过国家标准体系采纳的 IEC 参考进行处理。进口商与监管机构常以制造商技术文件、设计安全和测试证据以及容量、化学体系、防护特征标识等信息作为准入条件。对受监管品类，通常通过文件和样机抽检方式配合入境管理，尤其是面向消费电子销售的型号。
summary.zht: 安哥拉的鋰電池安全通常通過國家標準體系採納之 IEC 參考進行處理。進口商與監管機構常以製造商技術文件、設計安全與測試證據以及容量、化學體系、防護特徵標識等資訊作為准入條件。對受監管品類，通常透過文件與樣機抽檢方式配合入境管理，尤其是面向消費電子銷售的型號。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 62133 series (IEC 62133 adoption pathway in Angola-aligned implementations)
IANORQ harmonisation notices and sectoral conformity references for battery products

summary.en: China has domestic safety standards GB 31241-2022 for portable secondary lithium cells and related testing practice. GB/CCC reporting supports China-side market access, but does not automatically establish Angola-specific acceptance where local conformity workflows and importer documentation are required. Testing reports should be aligned to the exact exported model and battery chemistry.
summary.zh: 中国有 GB 31241-2022 等便携式密封可充电锂电池安全标准及其测试体系。GB/CCC 资料有助于中国本土合规，但不能自动替代安哥拉所需的本地接受流程和进口商文件要求。测试报告应对应出口具体型号和电池化学体系。
summary.zht: 中國有 GB 31241-2022 等便攜式密封可充電鋰電池安全標準及其測試體系。GB/CCC 資料有助於中國本土合規，但不能自動替代安哥拉所需的本地接受流程和進口商文件要求。測試報告應對應出口具體型號和電池化學體系。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries
CNCA/CNCA catalogue and SAMR-managed product safety obligations

gap.en: China reports often remain technical and factory-side; Angola market entry commonly requires local importer-facing evidence and documentary consistency in Portuguese. The gap is mainly one of acceptance and governance rather than only laboratory method, even when the underlying safety science is aligned.
gap.zh: 中国资料更偏向技术与工厂侧支撑，而安哥拉入场常要求当地进口商可见的证据链和葡语文件一致性。差距主要在于接受治理和文件衔接，而不仅仅是实验室方法，即使安全原理上有重叠。
gap.zht: 中國資料更偏向技術與工廠側支撐，而安哥拉入場常要求當地進口商可見的證據鏈和葡語文件一致性。差距主要在於接受治理和文件銜接，而不僅僅是實驗室方法，即使安全原理上有重疊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for importable products where Angola or importer applies IEC-referenced conformity controls; evidence quality and traceability are reviewed in the product flow.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic sale and manufacturing governance in China where applicable; not automatically transferable to Angola acceptance

source.publisher: IANORQ and linked technical standards references

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EN IEC 62133-aligned safety logic is relevant, but exporters should verify model-specific acceptance with the Angolan importer and ensure documentation format matches Angola customs and technical review expectations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 与 EN IEC 62133 对齐的安全逻辑是有价值的，但出口商应与安哥拉进口商确认具体型号验收要求，并确保文件格式与安哥拉海关及技术审查预期一致。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 與 EN IEC 62133 對齊的安全邏輯是有價值的，但出口商應與安哥拉進口商確認具體型號驗收要求，並確保文件格式與安哥拉海關及技術審查預期一致。
